mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM transaction_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = 2

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amount < 0 THEN ABS(amount) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expense FROM transaction_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
